name: Generation Capacity Mix
context: Allocate planned generation capacity share (%) across 22 candidate projects spanning solar, onshore/offshore wind, gas CCGT, nuclear SMR, battery storage, geothermal, hydro, and biomass. Balance the energy trilemma -- LCOE (cost), CO2 (carbon), Firmness (dispatchable reliability) -- plus land use, while a quadratic VariabilityRisk objective penalizes stacking correlated intermittent renewables. Options, scores, and the VariabilityRisk interaction (covariance) matrix are in scores.json.

scenarios.name: carbon_price
scenarios.description: A carbon price raises the effective cost of high-emitters (illustrative blanket LCOE uplift).

scenarios.name: low_renewables_year
scenarios.description: A poor solar+wind year: renewable output swings harder and co-moves more, so within-renewable correlations rise (regime shift via scale_groups on the VariabilityRisk matrix).
